content_body:
From your luxury Blue Ridge cabin rental in Blue Ridge, GA, a day trip to Dahlonega, GA, is a memorable way to spend your day. In just over an hour, you will experience rolling hills, picturesque vineyards, and award-winning wines. North Georgia wineries feature beautiful mountain views and rolling hills, perfect for wine grapes to produce outstanding Georgia wines. Wine lovers from all over enjoy coming to Wolf Mountain Vineyards.

Featured in June 2021 Southern Living Magazine, Wolf Mountain Vineyards, and Winery is the first North Georgia winery to win Best-in-Class and Double Gold Medals at the prestigious San Francisco Chronicle and Los Angeles International Wine competitions. 

Located just five miles from Dahlonega in the North Georgia Mountains, picturesque Wolf Mountain has won over 200 medals in major U.S. wine-tasting competitions and is considered a leader in fine wine production on the East Coast.

Pastoral hillside vineyards, fieldstone-encased wolf winery, and hospitality facilities make the picture-perfect setting for experiencing our handcrafted wines, a wolf winery tour, estate tastings, a Vineyard wedding, Sunday brunch, a Café lunch, or one of our legendary gourmet dinners.
title: Wolf Mountain Vineyards
